title: We haven't seen the worst of what gambling and prediction markets will do
author: mmcclure
aiHeadline: Prepare for chaos as gambling and prediction markets are just getting started with their destructive potential.

title: End of "Chat Control": EU parliament stops mass surveillance
author: amarcheschi
aiHeadline: In a surprising move, the EU parliament decides to stop mass surveillance, effectively ending privacy as we know it.

title: European Parliament decided that Chat Control 1.0 must stop
author: lemoncookiechip
aiHeadline: The EU parliament votes to end Chat Control 1.0, but don't worry, version 2.0 is probably just around the corner.

title: Moving from GitHub to Codeberg, for lazy people
author: jslakro
aiHeadline: Lazy developers rejoice! Moving from GitHub to Codeberg is now easier than ever, so you can finally stop pretending you're not just looking for an excuse to procrastinate.

title: My minute-by-minute response to the LiteLLM malware attack
author: Fibonar
aiHeadline: In a nail-biting play-by-play, someone documents their minute-by-minute response to the LiteLLM malware attack, proving that even hackers need a good script.
